cu_txt_unit_wysiwyg.cs_txt_unit_wysiwyg: I'm a philosopher with a PhD from Stockholm University. My research
interests include the philosophy of science, logic, language, and
Department of Philosophy, Linguistics and Theory of Science, University of Gothenburg.

cu_txt_unit_emph.cs_txt_unit_emph: Analyticity, Necessity and Belief: Aspects of Two-Dimensional Semantics

cu_txt_unit_wysiwyg.cs_txt_unit_wysiwyg: Professors Peter Pagin and Dag Westerståhl.
Professor Graeme Forbes, University of Colorado Boulder.
Tolkskolan (Interpreter/interrogator at the Armed Forces Intelligence and Security Center), Uppsala, Jun. 2001--Jun. 2002.
Eric Johannesson. Quine’s underdetermination thesis. Erkenntnis, 89(5)
Eric Johannesson. The statistical riddle of induction. Australasian Journal of Philosophy,
Eric Johannesson. Completeness also solves carnap’s problem. Thought
Eric Johannesson. On the indispensability of theoretical terms and entities. Synthese, 200(136),
Eric Johannesson. A posteriori necessities in one dimension. Linguistics and Philosophy,
Eric Johannesson. Classical versus Bayesian statistics. Philosophy of Science, 87(2)
Eric Johannesson. Realism and empirical equivalence. Journal of Philosophical Logic,
Eric Johannesson. Partial semantics for quantified modal logic. Journal of Philosophical Logic,
Eric Johannesson and Sara Packalen. The a priori-operator and the nesting problem. Thought
Eric Johannesson. Analyticity, Necessity and Belief
thesis, Stockholm University, Department of Philosophy, 2017.
Eric Johannesson. Monty Hall-problemet. Filosofisk Tidskrift, 38(2)
Eric Johannesson. Finns det objektiva sannolikheter? Filosofisk Tidskrift, 36(2)
Eric Johannesson. Goodmans induktionsproblem. Filosofisk Tidskrift, 35(4)
Teknik- och vetenskapsstudier - filosofi (Sciene and Technology Studies - Philosophy), 5
C-uppsats i teoretisk filosofi (Bachelor’s Thesis in Theoretical Philosophy), 15 ECTS.

cu_txt_unit_emph.cs_txt_unit_emph: Method: argumentation, semantics and formal logic
Context sensitivity: graduate course in the philosophy of language
Formal methods in philosophy: an overview

cu_txt_unit_wysiwyg.cs_txt_unit_wysiwyg: Leo Marklund, Kripkes lösning på problemet med framtida kontingens och varför den förbisetts,
Bachelor thesis (kandidatuppsats) in theoretical philosophy, Stockholm University, 2020.
Henrik Lundvall, Inconsistency Theories and the Self-refutable Argument, Master thesis
Nemi Pelgrom, Can every real proof be represented by a formal proof? The Hilbert-Gentzen
thesis, Master thesis (magisteruppsats) in theoretical philosophy, Stockholm University, 2018.
British Journal for the Philosophy of Science (1)
Notre Dame Journal of Formal Logic (1)
Studies in History and Philosophy of Science (1)
